prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of IBM stock, I used a random walk model with volatility based on typical large-cap tech stock daily movements (~1.4% daily volatility). The point estimate assumes no drift, with confidence intervals expanding based on normal distribution assumptions at 0.67, 1.28, and 1.64 standard deviations respectively.
